# neon_project_access (Resource)

Grants access to a Neon project by sharing it with a specified email address.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "neon_project_access" "example" {
  project_id       = neon_project.example.id
  granted_to_email = "user@example.com"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `granted_to_email` (String) The email address to grant project access to.
- `project_id` (String) The Neon project ID.

### Read-Only

- `granted_at` (String) The timestamp when the permission was granted.
- `permission_id` (String) The permission ID.
